steps.title: Substitute each time into the distance formula
steps.content:
Evaluate $d = 55t$ at both times:
  • After $9k$ hours: $d = 55(9k) = 495k$ miles
  • After $3k$ hours: $d = 55(3k) = 165k$ miles

steps.title: Calculate the ratio
steps.content:
Divide the distance at $9k$ hours by the distance at $3k$ hours:
$$\frac{495k}{165k} = \frac{495}{165} = 3$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
